# Blink & Find

Blink & Find is a free browser-based number hunting memory game. Players memorize a target number, find it on a scattered board, and compete for the lowest total time.

## Main game modes

- Local single-player and same-device multiplayer
- Same Challenge online rooms
- Live Race online rooms
- Daily Challenge
- Shared Challenge links
- Time Attack
- Streak Mode
- Practice Mode
- Comfort Mode
- Zen Mode

## Core rules

1. Memorize the target number during the preview.
2. Find the matching number after the target hides.
3. Wrong taps add penalty time.
4. The lowest total time wins.

## Product features

- Seeded boards for fair online challenges
- Shared countdowns for Live Race
- QR-code and link invitations
- Local and online result history
- Leaderboards and personal statistics
- Keyboard navigation and ARIA status updates
- Reduced-motion support
- Installable PWA manifest

## Technical summary

- Next.js 16
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Supabase for online rooms and results
- Playwright end-to-end tests
- Cloudflare deployment

## Website

https://blink-and-find.hinischalsubba.workers.dev

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/blink-and-find

## Fairness note

Live Race uses shared timestamps and deterministic boards for casual play. It is not designed as a cheat-resistant competitive platform.
